CompTIA A+ Practical Labs & Troubleshoot.description: CompTIA A+ Practical Labs & Troubleshooting (Exams 220-1201 & 220-1202) is a strictly hands-on study notes course built for A+ V15 exam prep, focused on real-world lab workflows rather than theory. Each module walks through technician workstation setup, ticket documentation, hardware assembly, OS deployment, network configuration, MDM enrollment, and troubleshooting on Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 24.04, and ChromeOS Flex using exact commands, diagnostic tools, and expected outputs.

CompTIA Cybersecurity Analyst (Exam CS0-.description: Prepare for CompTIA Cybersecurity Analyst (Exam CS0-003) with concise study notes focused on blue team defense, security monitoring, threat hunting, and intelligence-led analysis. This course covers SOC workflows, SIEM and EDR investigation, log analysis, vulnerability management, incident response, cloud and hybrid network telemetry, and the techniques needed to detect, triage, and respond to malicious activity with confidence.

CompTIA CySA+ Blue Team Operations Labs.description: CompTIA CySA+ Blue Team Operations Labs (Exam CS0-003) is a hands-on study notes course built for SOC analysts who want tactical, exam-focused practice in continuous monitoring and incident response. Work through realistic labs in Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel, Elastic SIEM, Graylog, and CrowdStrike Falcon to triage alerts, write detections with Sigma, KQL, and SPL, hunt with MITRE ATT&CK, and perform end-to-end analysis of vulnerabilities, malware, PCAPs, and threat intelligence feeds.

CompTIA Network+ (Exam N10-009).description: CompTIA Network+ (Exam N10-009) study notes course designed to help you build the foundational knowledge needed to securely establish, maintain, and troubleshoot modern networks. It covers core networking concepts, infrastructure, operations, security, cloud connectivity, SDN, automation, and zero-trust architecture, with practical exam prep across the topics you need to know for certification success.

CompTIA Network+ Hands-On Infrastructure.description: CompTIA Network+ Hands-On Infrastructure (Exam N10-009) is a lab-only study notes course built for certification prep through real-world network implementation and troubleshooting in GNS3 and EVE-NG. You’ll work through step-by-step subnetting exercises, VLANs, routing, NAT, firewalls, Wireshark and Zeek traffic analysis, SDN, automation, cloud networking, and zero-trust policy labs with topology diagrams, full CLI command sequences, and troubleshooting checkpoints.

CompTIA PenTest+ (Exam PT0-003).description: CompTIA PenTest+ (Exam PT0-003) is a study notes course for offensive security professionals preparing for the newest 2026 update of the exam. It covers the full penetration testing lifecycle, from scoping, reconnaissance, vulnerability validation, and safe exploitation to post-exploitation, reporting, and retesting, with advanced modules on APIs, cloud infrastructure, containers, and AI-integrated applications.

CompTIA PenTest+ Offensive Security Prac.description: CompTIA PenTest+ Offensive Security Practicals (Exam PT0-003) is a hands-on study notes course for the latest PT0-003 exam, focused on strict red-team lab workflows across the full pentest lifecycle. It covers scoping, reconnaissance, exploitation, post-exploitation, cloud and API attack labs, AI application testing, endpoint protection validation, and client-ready reporting using practical command syntax, attack chains, and lab-safe procedures on platforms like Hack The Box, TryHackMe, and local VMs.

CompTIA Security+ Applied Defense (Exam.description: CompTIA Security+ Applied Defense (Exam SY0-701) is a fully practical, scenario-driven study notes course built for hands-on cybersecurity operations and exam prep. You’ll work through step-by-step labs for defensive lab setup, zero-trust access control, pfSense, Snort, Suricata, Nessus Essentials, OpenVAS, cloud IAM, OSINT, phishing analysis, log hunting, and incident response using real-world tools, commands, and attack indicators.

CompTIA Security+ (Exam SY0-701).description: CompTIA Security+ (Exam SY0-701) study notes cover the latest foundational cybersecurity concepts, from threat intelligence, risk management, and security operations to cloud-native security, identity, and incident response. Built for exam prep, this course also explores AI-enhanced social engineering, supply chain threats, secure architecture, vulnerability management, cryptography, and governance frameworks to help you understand and apply core security principles with confidence.
